---
title: RAG Lesson
type: lesson
tags: [rag, ai]
created: 2026-03-15
---

Retrieval-Augmented Generation: ground LLM answers in real documents by searching a
knowledge base and injecting the top-N results into the prompt as context.

Key gotcha: chunk size matters. Too large loses precision; too small loses coherence.

Related: [[Second Brain Architecture]]

#rag #ai
